headline: Seagate Delivers Industry’s Highest Capacity Hard Drives with Next-Generation Mozaic™ 4+
summary: SINGAPORE, March 03, 2026--Seagate announced its Mozaic 4+ HAMR‑based platform, qualified and in production with two hyperscale cloud providers, supporting capacities up to 44TB

headline: Dow and Nasdaq plunge 2% as Amazon data centres hit in Iran war
summary: 10.32am: Iran is 'not just oil any more' as AWS damage moves dial US stocks have extended their slide, with selling accelerating asthe first hour of trading ticks past. The Dow is now down 1,244 points or 2.5% at 47,650, while its descent has been overtaken by the Nasdaq, which has plunged...

headline: Will Higher Semiconductor Revenues Help AVGO Stock Beat Q1 Earnings?
summary: Broadcom gears up to report fiscal Q1 results, with AI chip demand and VMware driving revenue growth despite margin pressure on strong XPU and networking sales.
